title: repl verb (FSLi interactive tool)
manager: An interactive REPL (FSLi) where you step a machine by hand — fire actions, inspect state and data, watch transitions — at a prompt. A REPL is how you build intuition about a machine's behavior and how you reproduce a bug interactively; it's the exploratory counterpart to the batch CLI verbs.
cs: jssm#630 is the twin repl-verb row (folds here under the jssm-empty policy)
